response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements implemented during the game's redevelopment. Although we successfully increased the frame rate by nearly doubling it through optimization enhancements, the integration of new hardware-intensive features, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces new performance challenges. We aim to maintain a balanced approach.  
Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can take in 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet can only accommodate 2800ml. Male test subjects release a different amount of fluid into the female during climax: a Dreamer typically ejaculates around 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing may expel 400-600ml.  
Pictures #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead trigger dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy levels, and stamina. Certain character perks, obtained through experimentation with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  
Pictures #4 and #5 demonstrate dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  
Pictures #6, #7, and #8 preview upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released next month.  
The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
